title: Interesting Public File Exposure
description: Potentially sensitive or operationally useful files were detected on an external web service.
impact: Exposed files can disclose configuration, APIs, stack details, or operational metadata that accelerates exploitation.
likelihood: High when API definitions, environment files, or status endpoints are accessible without authentication.
recommendations: Remove or restrict access to operational and sensitive files.
Review deployment pipelines for accidental publication.
Validate whether exposed content expands the attack surface.
